loc.syn: An Indonesian animation based on the famous soap opera on MNCTV, Si Entong, which aired in 2005.

An 11-year-old Tsubasa Oozora started playing football at a very young age. To pursue his dream to the best of his elementary school abilities, he moved to Nankatsu, which is well-known for its excellent elementary school soccer teams.
A news program that airs every afternoon, delivering the facts as they are, without fabrication, and presenting the latest and most current news.

“Dunia Masih Terbalik” is the sequel to the TV series “Dunia Terbalik.” With the arrival of new cast members—Endy Arfian as Erick and Ebel Cobra as David—the show promises even more compelling conflicts in a new, more exciting storyline.
Sultan, a man framed by his dark past, hides in a small mosque after prison. As the mosque faces demolition, he and his friends fight injustice while confronting suspicion and his desire for revenge.

Dora grew up, left the forest and now lives in the city of Playa Verde. Along with the exploring girls and Pablo, Dora and friends will work together and go on incredible adventures as they uncover the city's secrets.
City kids Aris and Ara visit the village and are told the long-forgotten story of 'Sang Kancil' by their grandfather, Aki.

A children's animated TV show about Upin and Ipin, five-year-old twin brothers who live with their older sister, Kak Ros, and their grandmother, lovingly called Opa, in the village of Kampung Durian Runtuh.
A news program that airs every afternoon, conveying the facts as they are, without any manipulation, and presenting the latest and most up-to-date news.
An infotainment program that reports the latest information and rumors about Indonesian celebrities.

The misadventures of a talking sea sponge who works at a fast food restaurant, attends a boating school, and lives in an underwater pineapple.

Naruto Uzumaki, is a loud, hyperactive, adolescent ninja who constantly searches for approval and recognition on his journey to becoming Hokage in his village.
Tsunatoyo is chosen as the next Shogun and heads to Edo. Assassins target him on the way. Shinnosuke protects him, but the enemies include his own brother and father-in-law.

New Family 100 is a game show that tests the participants' teamwork and knowledge in guessing the most popular survey answers, with a total prize pool of hundreds of millions of rupiah.

Morning Update, presents the latest information about news, celebrities, viral content, as well as tips and lifestyle designed to provide informative and entertaining information for viewers in the morning.
The daily news program broadcast on the iNews television network replaces the Sindo news program.

A 24-hour satellite and cable news television station in Indonesia. This station broadcasts infotainment news programs, talk shows, and sports news.
The morning sports news program broadcast by iNews TV presents the latest information about the world of sports from within Indonesia and abroad.
